title: mentha pulegium var. vulgaris
intro: Mentha pulegium var. vulgaris, commonly known as pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to Europe. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of pennyroyal include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and improve respiratory problems. Pennyroyal can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or infused oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
